title: botryanthus neglectus subsp. odorus
intro: Botryanthus neglectus subsp. odorus, also known as the sweet Odontella or Sweet Borneo, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, it is often combined with other herbs and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be taken internally to promote overall well-being.
